title: Stairway to Heaven
funFacts: Written by [artist:Jimmy Page] and [artist:Robert Plant], this epic song was never released as a single but is one of the most requested songs in radio history. The song was recorded in [date:1971] and features one of the most famous guitar solos ever. The lyrics were inspired by Celtic mythology and the works of J.R.R. Tolkien. The song appears on [album:Led Zeppelin IV].
